sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85260" key="poluprh/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-πρήων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85260.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many hillocks,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Κολωνός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0213.tlg001:7:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermesian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.57</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
